name: The Gold Mine Pawn
description_short: Goldmine Jewelers is a jewelry retailer in Tampa, FL specializing in custom grillz, Cuban link chains, and high-quality jewelry pieces with fast turnaround and competitive pricing.
description_long:
Goldmine Jewelers operates as a jewelry store located at 5400 E Busch Blvd in Tampa, Florida (Temple Terrace suburb, Hillsborough County). The business is currently listed under multiple retail categories including jewelry stores, fashion stores, and accessories stores, though it functions primarily as a jewelry retailer rather than a traditional pawn shop despite its current categorization. The company has not completed business verification on the Wheree platform as of the data collection date.

The business specializes in custom jewelry pieces, with particular emphasis on custom grillz and Cuban link chains. According to aggregated customer feedback, they offer a variety of jewelry including earrings, rings, bracelets, and other accessories. Product materials emphasize high-quality options, with customers noting authentic Mexican and Brazilian jewelry selections, as well as genuine silver pieces. The store maintains limited operating hours, open only Wednesday through Sunday (closed Monday and Tuesday), with extended hours on Friday and Saturday until 8:00 PM.

Goldmine Jewelers distinguishes itself through emphasis on craftsmanship, fast service turnaround times on custom pieces, and competitive pricing relative to competitors. Customer feedback highlights the knowledgeable and friendly staff, professional service, and an inviting store atmosphere. The company has earned praise for the visual appeal of designs and meticulous attention to detail in jewelry construction. Delivery speed is noted as reliable and efficient in aggregated reviews.

While the business maintains generally positive customer feedback regarding quality and service, the company profile shows no verified customer reviews on this platform as of the data date. Pricing is noted as variable depending on the specific item, which could affect perceived value consistency. The business has not yet completed the verification process with the platform, and actual customer testimonials are absent. For prospective customers, direct contact via phone (+1 813-424-445) is recommended to confirm current pricing, availability, and specific service details.
pros: Specializes in custom jewelry including grillz and Cuban link chains with meticulous craftsmanship attention
Customers praise fast and reliable turnaround times on custom pieces
Uses high-quality materials including authentic silver and genuine Mexican/Brazilian jewelry options
Competitively priced compared to competitors while maintaining quality standards
Staff described as knowledgeable, friendly, and professionally respectful in customer interactions
Efficient purchasing process and quick delivery noted by customers
Inviting store atmosphere that enhances the shopping experience
cons: Business has not completed verification process on the platform, limiting credibility signals
Currently shows zero verified customer reviews despite positive aggregated feedback summaries
Operating hours are limited (closed Monday-Tuesday, only 7-8 hours per day other days)
Pricing noted as variable by item type, which may create perceived inconsistency in value
No customer Q&A activity on the listing, limiting transparent peer-to-peer information
best_for: Customers seeking custom jewelry pieces like grillz and Cuban link chains with fast turnaround
Buyers looking for high-quality silver and authentic Latin American jewelry at competitive prices
Consumers who prefer personalized service and knowledgeable staff assistance for custom orders
diagnosis: Goldmine Jewelers is best suited for customers seeking custom, high-quality jewelry pieces with fast turnaround and personalized service in the Tampa area. The primary caveat is the absence of verified customer reviews on this platform and unconfirmed verification status, so direct contact is recommended to validate current pricing, availability, and specific service offerings before purchase.
services: Cuban link chain sales and customization
Silver jewelry sales and custom work
Mexican and Brazilian authentic jewelry retail
